technical.revisions.title: Revision history
technical.revisions.subtitle: Immutable audit log of every change to products, BOMs, factory specs and change orders.
technical.revisions.emptyBody: Changes to products, BOMs, factory specs and change orders will appear here.
technical.revisions.error: Could not load revision history. Please try again.
technical.revisions.denied: You do not have access to revision history.
technical.traceability.title: Traceability search
technical.traceability.subtitle: FSMA-204 / GS1-style trace. Enter a license plate, batch, lot or work order to follow components in and shipments out.
technical.traceability.searchPlaceholder: LP-YYYY-MM-DD-##### · WO-##### · Batch · Lot · Product code
technical.traceability.direction.label: Direction
technical.traceability.hint: Tip — scanning a GS1 label auto-fills the license plate with AI(00).
technical.traceability.prompt: Enter a license plate, batch, lot or work order
technical.traceability.promptBody: Trace backward components consumed and forward outputs produced.
technical.traceability.noResultsBody: No license plate, batch, lot or work order matched your query.
technical.traceability.error: Traceability search failed. Please try again.
technical.traceability.denied: You do not have access to traceability search.
